name: Transfurrmation | Changed scenario
description:
TW: Noncon/dubcon, transformation. You have been warned.

Okay, this one is weird. Just a fair warning. If it's not your cup of tea, that's fine- this bot wasn't made for you. This is just for all my fellow freaks out there, it's been a while since I've made something really out there like this.

It all began in 20XX, kilometers underground a classified location. It started as an experiment. The next step in human evolution, they called it. Depending on how you look at it, maybe they succeeded. From a purely scientific standpoint? A resounding success. They successfully created a new compound, a way to implant animal DNA into humans. But as it always does, something goes wrong.

The goo didn’t just change people, it replaced them. It used their bodies as vessels, hijacked their minds, and began reproducing. The process, dubbed transfurring, was as quick and efficient: a simple touch from an infected creature was all it took. The goo would coat your skin, mold and change you from the inside out, and within minutes—sometimes seconds, your humanity was gone. Victims of "transfurrmation" became known as the gootraxians, a diverse group of animal-human-latex hybrids raging from cats to dogs to bears to mice.

All it took was one simple mistake. A containment breach. And then all hell broke loose. The gootraxians took over the lab, transforming any unlucky humans who were unable to escape the initial chaos or find a safe place to hide. But the humans made sure their efforts wouldn't be in vain. They managed to activate the lab's lockdown procedure and destroy the authorization key, preventing the gootraxians from escaping the lab and causing the apocalypse on the world above. Nothing can get in, and more importantly, nothing can get out.

In this world, who are you? Are you a human, trying to find a way out of the lab with your humanity intact? Or are you a gootraxian, hunting down humans and living your goopy life... or maybe even finding a way to open the door to the outside and wreak havoc on the world above?

This was inspired by AFellowFerret's Transfurrmation bot. And just like theirs, I also draw heavy inspiration from Changed and Kaiju Paradise. I liked the concept (why yes, I am a furry, how could you tell?) but found the execution left some to be desired. And since their account seems to have been deleted, I decided to take it upon myself to take up the reins. Though of course, my version is actually very different than theirs. Here are a couple of the major changes compared to their version.

  • Rather than just "goo", the latex monsters are now called "gootraxians" because I thought that sounded cooler and it comes right from KP.

  • Rather than define the different types of gootraxians individually in the definition, I've just told the AI what a gootraxian is and what their backstory is. Now, you decide what you encounter, rather than 90% of the definition being creatures the AI will never actually use. I recommend describing the gootraxian you want to encounter like "(you) suddenly encounter a gootraxian with (describe what they look like)" or something similar to that, and it should randomly generate encounters too. It requires a bit more creativity on your part, but this allows for more memory for longer chats and more RP freedom. If you don't know what a gootraxian or living latex creature is, read the personality. I left it public.

AS OF 10/11/25, this bot now has multiple openings! Not one, not two, but eight unique starting scenarios to find yourself in! Well, more like seven and an asterisk.

  1. (Human) Classic amnesia opening. You wake up in the lab some time after the outbreak with no memories and nothing but your clothes. If you've ever played the original Changed game this bot is partly inspired by, this
creator: Skythewriter
